name: Jitsi
tagline: This one click app is based on Jitsi docker image.
description:
This one click app is based on Jitsi docker image.


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  jitsi-web:
    image: jitsi/web:4416
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - jitsi-web:/config
      - jitsi-web-transcripts:/usr/share/jitsi-meet/transcripts
    environment:
      JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET: pass
      JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD: pass
      JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD: pass
      JIGASI_XMPP_PASSWORD: pass
      JIBRI_RECORDER_PASSWORD: pass
      JIBRI_XMPP_PASSWORD: pass
      HTTP_PORT: 8000
      HTTPS_PORT: 8443
      TZ: Europe/Amsterdam
      XMPP_DOMAIN: meet.jitsi
      XMPP_SERVER: jitsi-prosody
      XMPP_BOSH_URL_BASE: http://jitsi-prosody:5280
      XMPP_AUTH_DOMAIN: auth.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_MUC_DOMAIN: muc.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_DOMAIN: internal-muc.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_GUEST_DOMAIN: guest.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_MODULES: ''
      XMPP_MUC_MODULES: ''
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_MODULES: ''
      JVB_BREWERY_MUC: jvbbrewery
      JVB_AUTH_USER: jvb
      JVB_STUN_SERVERS: meet-jit-si-turnrelay.jitsi.net:443
      JVB_PORT: 10000
      JVB_TCP_HARVESTER_DISABLED: 'true'
      JVB_TCP_PORT: 4443
      JICOFO_AUTH_USER: focus
      JIGASI_XMPP_USER: jigasi
      JIGASI_BREWERY_MUC: jigasibrewery
      JIGASI_PORT_MIN: '20000'
      JIGASI_PORT_MAX: '20050'
      XMPP_RECORDER_DOMAIN: recorder.meet.jitsi
      JIBRI_RECORDER_USER: recorder
      JIBRI_RECORDING_DIR: /config/recordings
      JIBRI_FINALIZE_RECORDING_SCRIPT_PATH: /config/finalize.sh
      JIBRI_XMPP_USER: jibri
      JIBRI_BREWERY_MUC: jibribrewery
      JIBRI_PENDING_TIMEOUT: '90'
      JIBRI_STRIP_DOMAIN_JID: muc
      JIBRI_LOGS_DIR: /config/logs
    ports:
      - 42055:80
  jitsi-prosody:
    image: jitsi/prosody:4416
    restart: unless-stopped
    expose:
      - '5222'
      - '5347'
      - '5280'
    volumes:
      - jitsi-prosody:/config
    environment:
      JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET: pass
      JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD: pass
      JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD: pass
      JIGASI_XMPP_PASSWORD: pass
      JIBRI_RECORDER_PASSWORD: pass
      JIBRI_XMPP_PASSWORD: pass
      HTTP_PORT: 8000
      HTTPS_PORT: 8443
      TZ: Europe/Amsterdam
      XMPP_DOMAIN: meet.jitsi
      XMPP_SERVER: jitsi-prosody
      XMPP_BOSH_URL_BASE: http://jitsi-prosody:5280
      XMPP_AUTH_DOMAIN: auth.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_MUC_DOMAIN: muc.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_DOMAIN: internal-muc.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_GUEST_DOMAIN: guest.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_MODULES: ''
      XMPP_MUC_MODULES: ''
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_MODULES: ''
      JVB_BREWERY_MUC: jvbbrewery
      JVB_AUTH_USER: jvb
      JVB_STUN_SERVERS: meet-jit-si-turnrelay.jitsi.net:443
      JVB_PORT: 10000
      JVB_TCP_HARVESTER_DISABLED: 'true'
      JVB_TCP_PORT: 4443
      JICOFO_AUTH_USER: focus
      JIGASI_XMPP_USER: jigasi
      JIGASI_BREWERY_MUC: jigasibrewery
      JIGASI_PORT_MIN: '20000'
      JIGASI_PORT_MAX: '20050'
      XMPP_RECORDER_DOMAIN: recorder.meet.jitsi
      JIBRI_RECORDER_USER: recorder
      JIBRI_RECORDING_DIR: /config/recordings
      JIBRI_FINALIZE_RECORDING_SCRIPT_PATH: /config/finalize.sh
      JIBRI_XMPP_USER: jibri
      JIBRI_BREWERY_MUC: jibribrewery
      JIBRI_PENDING_TIMEOUT: '90'
      JIBRI_STRIP_DOMAIN_JID: muc
      JIBRI_LOGS_DIR: /config/logs
  jitsi-jicofo:
    image: jitsi/jicofo:4416
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - jitsi-jicofo:/config
    environment:
      JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET: pass
      JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD: pass
      JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD: pass
      JIGASI_XMPP_PASSWORD: pass
      JIBRI_RECORDER_PASSWORD: pass
      JIBRI_XMPP_PASSWORD: pass
      HTTP_PORT: 8000
      HTTPS_PORT: 8443
      TZ: Europe/Amsterdam
      XMPP_DOMAIN: meet.jitsi
      XMPP_SERVER: jitsi-prosody
      XMPP_BOSH_URL_BASE: http://jitsi-prosody:5280
      XMPP_AUTH_DOMAIN: auth.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_MUC_DOMAIN: muc.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_DOMAIN: internal-muc.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_GUEST_DOMAIN: guest.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_MODULES: ''
      XMPP_MUC_MODULES: ''
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_MODULES: ''
      JVB_BREWERY_MUC: jvbbrewery
      JVB_AUTH_USER: jvb
      JVB_STUN_SERVERS: meet-jit-si-turnrelay.jitsi.net:443
      JVB_PORT: 10000
      JVB_TCP_HARVESTER_DISABLED: 'true'
      JVB_TCP_PORT: 4443
      JICOFO_AUTH_USER: focus
      JIGASI_XMPP_USER: jigasi
      JIGASI_BREWERY_MUC: jigasibrewery
      JIGASI_PORT_MIN: '20000'
      JIGASI_PORT_MAX: '20050'
      XMPP_RECORDER_DOMAIN: recorder.meet.jitsi
      JIBRI_RECORDER_USER: recorder
      JIBRI_RECORDING_DIR: /config/recordings
      JIBRI_FINALIZE_RECORDING_SCRIPT_PATH: /config/finalize.sh
      JIBRI_XMPP_USER: jibri
      JIBRI_BREWERY_MUC: jibribrewery
      JIBRI_PENDING_TIMEOUT: '90'
      JIBRI_STRIP_DOMAIN_JID: muc
      JIBRI_LOGS_DIR: /config/logs
    depends_on:
      - jitsi-prosody
  jitsi-jvb:
    image: jitsi/jvb:4416
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - jitsi-jvb:/config
    environment:
      JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET: pass
      JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD: pass
      JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD: pass
      JIGASI_XMPP_PASSWORD: pass
      JIBRI_RECORDER_PASSWORD: pass
      JIBRI_XMPP_PASSWORD: pass
      HTTP_PORT: 8000
      HTTPS_PORT: 8443
      TZ: Europe/Amsterdam
      XMPP_DOMAIN: meet.jitsi
      XMPP_SERVER: jitsi-prosody
      XMPP_BOSH_URL_BASE: http://jitsi-prosody:5280
      XMPP_AUTH_DOMAIN: auth.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_MUC_DOMAIN: muc.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_DOMAIN: internal-muc.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_GUEST_DOMAIN: guest.meet.jitsi
      XMPP_MODULES: ''
      XMPP_MUC_MODULES: ''
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_MODULES: ''
      JVB_BREWERY_MUC: jvbbrewery
      JVB_AUTH_USER: jvb
      JVB_STUN_SERVERS: meet-jit-si-turnrelay.jitsi.net:443
      JVB_PORT: 10000
      JVB_TCP_HARVESTER_DISABLED: 'true'
      JVB_TCP_PORT: 4443
      JICOFO_AUTH_USER: focus
      JIGASI_XMPP_USER: jigasi
      JIGASI_BREWERY_MUC: jigasibrewery
      JIGASI_PORT_MIN: '20000'
      JIGASI_PORT_MAX: '20050'
      XMPP_RECORDER_DOMAIN: recorder.meet.jitsi
      JIBRI_RECORDER_USER: recorder
      JIBRI_RECORDING_DIR: /config/recordings
      JIBRI_FINALIZE_RECORDING_SCRIPT_PATH: /config/finalize.sh
      JIBRI_XMPP_USER: jibri
      JIBRI_BREWERY_MUC: jibribrewery
      JIBRI_PENDING_TIMEOUT: '90'
      JIBRI_STRIP_DOMAIN_JID: muc
      JIBRI_LOGS_DIR: /config/logs
    depends_on:
      - jitsi-prosody
volumes:
  jitsi-web: null
  jitsi-web-transcripts: null
  jitsi-prosody: null
  jitsi-jicofo: null
  jitsi-jvb: null
